title: Trial Disks
description: Backports the Trial Chamber related disks to 1.20.1 (fabric) !
body:
# hi

This tiny little mod (if you stalk my page a little i think you can start to see a pattern) that I slapped together in about ~~30 minutes~~ an hour adds the disks related to trial chambers (creator, creator (musicbox) and precipice), and the AvM Remix of Pigstep (because why not) to 1.20.1! 

Also, it adds 4 new recipes corresponding to each disk 

### Why do you want to download this mod you say? 
Why would you _not_ want the absolute banger that is creator 

oh yeah and also the other disks or whatever 

### Critical (maybe??) information:
As the broke, uneducated parasite i am, im forced to use.. minimal developement software (im also too lazy to go look for better) you might need to set a newer java version for your modpack for this mod to work (java 21 works for me so throw that at the wall till it sticks)
### Last note:
discord link probably has a issue tracker, if not dm me im the owner of the server trust me ill answer
